role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (deciduous vs coniferous) and growth habits.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (curbs, fencing, road width).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and general 'feel' of the location.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (curbs, fencing, vegetation) that supported the final decision. The tournament correctly resolved the Mexico vs US ambiguity by prioritizing infrastructure and architectural cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of semi-arid terrain and dormant trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identification of dormant deciduous trees and coniferous hills is accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Concrete curbs and chain-link fences are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Ranch-style architecture description is consistent with the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction was correct (United States).
